questionEdit.editedStem: REAL011 修订后题干：已调整题干、分值、难度和来源框。

rollback: delete from review_queue_items where payload->>'questionItemId' = 'bd2986cf-c453-43d2-bfab-f0f39c4bd3d9' or payload->>'sourceRegionId' = '156749ff-9857-4750-8f5a-23d40476f582'; delete from question_blocks where question_item_id = 'bd2986cf-c453-43d2-bfab-f0f39c4bd3d9'; delete from question_items where id = 'bd2986cf-c453-43d2-bfab-f0f39c4bd3d9';
summaryChinese: 题干、答案、解析、题型、分值、难度和 SourceRegion bbox 均可修订，且题目与来源框修订都有 audit。
